reviews.review_description:
Passthrough ToyBox is a wildly fun mixed-reality playground where the goal is simple: make as much mess as possible and enjoy every second of it.

Repaint your real walls with a paintball gun, blast toys into a corner with a leaf blower, mess around with ping-pong on your own, or switch things up with cricket and mini-golf. You can spawn bricks, balls, portals, and just experiment freely with physics and space.

It’s creative, chaotic, and endlessly entertaining. The best part? You don’t have to clean up afterward. Pure stress-free fun and a fantastic showcase of what mixed reality can be when it doesn’t take itself too seriously. Highly recommended for instant smiles 😄
